summary: Frontend-only testing of redesigned DashboardPage and LeagueDetailPage with 'جبار' (awesome) design. All 7 requested features working correctly: Dashboard design, room entry, LeagueDetailPage tabs (Fixtures, Standings, Scorers, Assists), and navigation flows.

dashboard_page: New lime/emerald gradient design with 'الغرف المباشرة' title displayed correctly
Categories filter (الكل, رياضة, ترفيه, تكنولوجيا) working
Status filter (مغلقة, مباشر, الكل) with counters working
Room cards showing: image, participant count, member count, category badge
Member badge 'عضو' displayed for joined rooms
Host info with avatar and crown badge shown
Enter button 'دخول' navigates to room successfully
Join button 'انضمام' visible for non-member rooms
Bottom navigation (الرئيسية, المباريات, الغرف, المنشورات, حسابي) working
room_entry: Room shows participant list, mic controls, speaker stages
matches_page: Date selector showing Gregorian (20 مارس 2026م) and Hijri (1 شوال 1447هـ) dates
Calendar strip with day selection working
League cards with team logos and match times displayed
Click on league header navigates to /league/{leagueId}
league_detail_page: League header with flag, name, and season info displayed
Fixtures tab (المباريات): Shows matches grouped by date with team logos and times
Standings tab (الترتيب): Full league table with rank colors (top 4 emerald, bottom red)
Scorers tab (الهدافين): Top scorers with photos, goals count, gold badge for #1
Assists tab (صانعي الأهداف): Top assist providers with photos and counts

critical_code_review_comments: DashboardPage design is visually impressive with lime/emerald gradients, stadium background effects
LeagueDetailPage tabs properly switch content using activeTab state
API Football integration working correctly for fixtures, standings, scorers, and assists
Minor ESLint warnings in DashboardPage.js and LeagueDetailPage.js for useEffect dependencies (non-critical)
All data-testid attributes present for room cards and navigation buttons
seed_data_creation: None - used existing rooms and API Football data
context_for_next_testing_agent: DashboardPage and LeagueDetailPage redesign complete with 'جبار' design using lime/emerald color scheme. All tabs in LeagueDetailPage working (Fixtures, Standings, Scorers, Assists). Navigation from MatchesPage to LeagueDetailPage by clicking league header works. Room entry working with Agora voice chat integration.
